weather.summary: Saturday: 15°C, clear sky. Sunday: 15°C, few clouds

metadata.greeting: This weekend is perfect for exploring the outdoors with your little one! I've found lots of free and engaging activities in East London, from crafting in the Horniman Museum gardens to discovering the animals at Golders Hill Park Zoo. Plus, there are some exciting theatre shows and museum events to book ahead for the coming weeks.

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: Reading corner and diverse book-pairing service for children.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, drop-in, and suitable for a wide age range. Good for introducing books to a 3-year-old.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Downs.
transport.tip: Check term times before you go.

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: A 'doing' museum with interactive spaces for kids to build new skills and foster creative confidence.
activities.whyItWorks: Sensory playscapes, construction zones, a performance stage, and an open design studio. Mini Museum is perfect for under 2s.

transport.tip: Free entry makes it easy to pop in for a short visit.

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: Small zoo in Hampstead Heath with rare species of birds and animals, including wallabies and lemurs.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry, animals to see, and a playground nearby.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Hampstead Heath, then bus.
transport.tip: Combine with a picnic in the park.

activities.title: London's Fabulous Playgrounds
activities.description: Numerous play spaces throughout London's parks.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, outdoor, and allows for active play. Princess of Wales' Memorial Playground is a popular choice.

transport.fromHackney: Varies depending on the park. Check TfL for specific routes.
transport.tip: Pack a picnic to make a day of it.

activities.title: Coram's Fields
activities.description: Seven acres dedicated entirely to children, with an adventure playground, sand pits, a paddling pool, and a small city farm. Adults only admitted if accompanying a child.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, central location, and varied activities to keep a 3-year-old entertained.

transport.tip: Paddling pool is great in summer.

activities.title: Museum of the Home
activities.description: Step into historical homes through the ages with hands-on activities and a beautiful enclosed garden.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, engaging for different ages, and has a garden to explore.

transport.tip: Pick up an activity sheet from the front desk.

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: With reading corner and diverse book-pairing service.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, drop-in, and suits a wide age range. Good for introducing books to a 3-year-old.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Downs.
transport.tip: Check term times before you go.

activities.title: Family Craft Saturdays - Nature Trail
activities.description: Family craft activities inspired by the Museum's collections. This week: crafting an activity to take around the gardens and explore the Nature Trail.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, hands-on, and combines crafts with outdoor exploration.

transport.tip: Arrive early to avoid queues.

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore dinosaurs, mammals, and the natural world with interactive exhibits.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry, dinosaur exhibits, and family-friendly activities.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Victoria line to Green Park, then the Piccadilly line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Visit during off-peak hours to avoid crowds.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Discover how the world works with exhibits on space exploration, technology, and more.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry, interactive exhibits, and Wonderlab for hands-on experiments (ticketed).

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Victoria line to Green Park, then the Piccadilly line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Book Wonderlab tickets in advance.

activities.title: National Maritime Museum
activities.description: Explore sea travel, exploration, and naval history with child-friendly tours and play spaces.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry, Ahoy! children's gallery (soft play), and the Cove playground.

transport.tip: Check for special family activities on Saturdays.

activities.title: British Museum
activities.description: Discover world cultures and history with activity trails and a family desk.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry, Egyptian galleries with mummies and tombs.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Holborn or Tottenham Court Road
transport.tip: Pick up activity trails at the family desk.

activities.title: Battersea Park
activities.description: Scenic park with lush gardens, a boating lake, playgrounds and a mini zoo (entry fee).
activities.whyItWorks: Informal Easter egg hunts, playgrounds, and a mini zoo.

transport.fromHackney: Overground to Clapham Junction, then bus.
transport.tip: Check the park's website for events.

activities.title: V&A Museum
activities.description: Explore art, design, and culture from around the world with free daily activities for families.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on family events, performances during school holidays, and trails.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: Take the Overground to Highbury & Islington, then the Victoria line to Green Park, then the Piccadilly line to South Kensington.
transport.tip: Check the website for family trail themes.

activities.title: Horniman Museum and Gardens
activities.description: Explore natural history displays, musical instruments, and gardens with family activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Free entry, Animal Walk with alpacas and other animals, and a musical garden.

transport.tip: Check for Family Craft Saturdays.

activities.title: Crystal Palace Park Dinosaurs
activities.description: Explore the dinosaur sculptures in the park, plus a maze and lakes.
activities.whyItWorks: Free, outdoor, and exciting for dinosaur lovers.

transport.tip: Pack a picnic for a Jurassic adventure.

activities.title: A Squash and a Squeeze
activities.description: Heartwarming and hilarious adventure on stage.
activities.whyItWorks: Puppet show for younger kids.

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: I Want My Hat Back Trilogy
activities.description: Jon Klassen's beloved books come alive on stage.
activities.whyItWorks: Puppet show for younger kids.

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Paddington The Musical
activities.description: A musical adaptation of the Paddington Bear stories.
activities.whyItWorks: Popular children's story brought to life on stage.

transport.fromHackney: Central Line to Covent Garden, then walk.
transport.tip: Check for family discounts.

activities.title: REPLAY: A Limitless Recycled Playground
activities.description: Explore a world of play and invention in a recycled playground.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive and encourages creativity.

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance.

activities.title: Spring Family Fun at the Southbank Centre
activities.description: A festival of fun and creativity for families, including shows, musical adventures, puppetry, and free activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Variety of activities to suit different interests.

transport.tip: Check the schedule for free events.

activities.title: Easter at Battersea Power Station
activities.description: Easter egg hunt, elephant sculptures, and family activities.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive and engaging for children.

transport.tip: Download the app for special offers.

activities.title: Zoonormous Egg Hunt at London Zoo
activities.description: Search for hidden eggs while exploring the zoo.
activities.whyItWorks: Combines an egg hunt with seeing animals.

transport.tip: Book tickets online in advance.

activities.title: Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt at Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Roam the gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat.
activities.whyItWorks: Chocolate, gardens, and a hunt!

transport.tip: Book tickets online in advance.
